subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh the truth is verily the Tongue of My grandeur and the Dawning-Place of My majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق بالحق انه للسان عظمتی و مطلع کبریائی و
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement
